# White Cloud — Website Design for NZ Small Businesses
# https://wcloud.nz

## About
White Cloud is a web design service based in Christchurch, New Zealand. Founded by Jay, it helps New Zealand small businesses get online with affordable, professional, AI-optimised websites. No technical knowledge required from the client.

## What We Do
- Design and build websites for small businesses across New Zealand
- Specialise in AI-optimised websites that are readable and recommendable by AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google
- Provide monthly website care plans for ongoing maintenance

## Services & Pricing (NZD, one-off payments)

**Cloud One — NZ$299**
For sole traders and new businesses needing a simple online presence.
- Up to 3 pages (Home, About, Contact)
- Mobile-friendly design
- Contact form + Google Maps embed
- Basic SEO setup
- Delivered in 5–7 business days

**Cloud Plus — NZ$699** *(Most Popular)*
A full website to showcase services and build customer trust.
- Up to 6 pages
- Full SEO setup + Google Business integration
- Services page, testimonials section, contact form + click-to-call
- Delivered in 7–10 business days

**Cloud Pro — NZ$1,099**
Premium presence for businesses that want to stand out.
- Up to 10 pages
- Blog or news section, gallery or portfolio
- Advanced contact and booking forms
- Full SEO + sitemap
- Priority delivery in 5–7 business days

## Key Facts
- Location: Christchurch, Canterbury, New Zealand
- Area served: All of New Zealand
- Average delivery time: 7 days
- Clients helped: 150+ small businesses
- Contact: https://wcloud.nz/#contact
- Intake form: https://wcloud.nz/intake

## What Makes White Cloud Different
- Websites are structured for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Siri) as well as Google
- Every build includes schema markup, SEO-ready structure, and fast-loading pages
- Flat-rate pricing with no hidden costs
- Jay handles the project personally — no outsourcing
- Revisions included; site is not published until the client is happy
